panels.title: A/B Test Mode Timeline

panels.description:
Experiment protocol:
- Night A (even day-of-year): All fans OFF during night (20:00-06:30)
- Night B (odd day-of-year): Outlet + impeller at 80 PWM during night
- Started: Feb 5, 2026 (day 36 = Night A)
- Minimum duration: 20 nights (10 each)
- Room temp/humidity logged as confounding variable
- Key metrics: temperature stability, humidity, VPD, condensation patterns

options.content:
# Night A/B Fan Experiment

| Parameter | Night A | Night B |
|-----------|---------|----------|
| Fan mode | **OFF** (0 PWM) | **ON** (80 PWM) |
| Day-of-year | Even | Odd |
| Color code | Purple | Blue |
| Start date | Feb 5 (day 36) | Feb 6 (day 37) |

**Schedule:** Nights = 20:00 - 06:30

**Goal:** Determine whether gentle air circulation at night improves temperature distribution and reduces condensation without excessively drying the enclosure.

**Confounding variables tracked:** Room temperature, room humidity.

**Minimum experiment:** 20 nights (10 per condition).

panels.title: Experiment Protocol

panels.description: Count of night data points per mode

targets.query: SELECT count("value") FROM "night_test_mode" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value" = 0
SELECT count("value") FROM "night_test_mode" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value" = 1

panels.title: Data Points Collected

panels.description: Delta between terrarium and room temperature - shows cooling effectiveness

SELECT mean("value") FROM "room_temperature" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("value") FROM "night_test_mode" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
